title: STAR Incident - Cognizant OCR Noise in Document Pipeline
content:
Incident: OCR noise reducing downstream extraction quality

Situation:
- Scanned and semi-structured enterprise documents produced OCR artifacts that degraded NLP extraction quality.
- Error propagation across pipeline stages impacted confidence in final outputs.

Task:
- Improve extraction reliability by reducing OCR-originated noise and tightening downstream validation.

Action:
- Enhanced preprocessing and quality checks around OCR outputs.
- Applied domain-aware cleanup and validation before entity extraction stages.
- Added inconsistency checks to catch low-quality outputs before workflow integration.
- Iterated with operational feedback from downstream users and reviewers.

Result:
- Source context points to improved extraction consistency and workflow efficiency in document operations.
- Incident yielded reusable quality-gating patterns for OCR-heavy pipelines.
